A '''species''' of [[Color/Legends|blue-gray]]-skinned [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoids]] with pointed ears. One such being on [[Tirahnn/Legends|Tirahnn]], recognized [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] and reported them to [[Kharys]].

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars Annual (1977) 1|''Star Wars Annual'' (1977) 1]] {{Reprint|Star Wars Annual (1977) 1}} {{1st}}
